results.content: {"results":[{"title":"Enterprise Print Management Software: Selection & Strategy - Cost, Security & Compliance (2025)","content":"Enterprise print management software helps control costs and enhance security. Key players include PaperCut MF/NG (known for refined cost allocation and secure release printing), HP JetAdvantage (deep HP hardware integration), Printix (cloud-native for remote work), and Lansweeper (IT asset visibility). Modern features span cost tracking, user authentication, print quotas, watermarking, audit logging, and policy enforcement. Best practices include centralized management, role-based access control, and integration with broader DLP (Data Loss Prevention) frameworks.","url":"https://baijiahao.baidu.com/s?id=1852876253155290098"},{"title":"2025 Print Management Software Selection Guide","content":"Comprehensive comparison of print management solutions for 2025.
